response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist engineer with nearly two decades of production work and genuinely relevant recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq, but the role demands 8+ years building AI-driven solutions and he shows roughly one. There is no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, Python, or designing AI systems on cloud platforms at scale, and his customer-facing technical-discovery leadership is implied rather than demonstrated. Strong engineer, wrong specialization depth for a staff-level forward-deployed GenAI position.
strengths: Current hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly matching a listed key technology
19 years of production engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems, with strong TypeScript/Node depth
Proven knowledge-sharing and mentoring record: workshops, multi-day courses, conference talks, and long-running open-source project leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions; GenAI experience spans only about one year
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation/observability, or Python
Limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms or leading enterprise customer discovery, plus an unexplained employment gap from January to September 2020

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector database, and LLM evaluation expertise
Recent MCP/agentic tooling work and strong TypeScript engineering foundation
